parameters.query: WITH body AS (SELECT convert_from(decode($2, 'base64'), 'UTF8')::jsonb AS j), ins AS (INSERT INTO execution_steps (execution_id, step_index, step_type, step_id, outcome, variables) SELECT $1::uuid, ((SELECT j->>'step_index' FROM body))::int, (SELECT j->>'step_type' FROM body), (SELECT j->>'step_id' FROM body), (SELECT j->>'outcome' FROM body), (SELECT j->'variables' FROM body) RETURNING execution_id) UPDATE executions SET variables = (SELECT j->'variables' FROM body) WHERE id = $1::uuid RETURNING true AS ok
